utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I am telling you , she said she is looking for a relationship with someone exactly like me .

emotion_cause.span: 1_she said she is looking for a relationship with someone exactly like me .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Well , I added the exactly like me part ...

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: But she said she is looking for someone , and someone is gonna be there tonight .

emotion_cause.span: 4_she said she is looking for someone , and someone is gonna be there tonight .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Well , I think it is perfect . You know , it is just gonna be the two of us , she spent all day taking care of my monkey ...

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I can not remember the last time I got a girl to take care of my monkey .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Anyway , I figured after work I would go pick up a bottle of wine , go over there and , uh , try to woo her .

utterances.text: Hey , you know what you should do ? You should take her back to the 1890 s , when that phrase was last used .
